cystic-fibrosis.Task: Identify the recessive causal variant for cystic fibrosis in the simulated CEPH family sequencing dataset.
cystic-fibrosis.Prompt:
Find the genetic cause of Cystic fibrosis; identify the causal recessive variant consistent with affected siblings NA12885, NA12886, and NA12879. The output should be a CSV file with the following columns: chromosome,position,variant_id,reference,alternate,gene_name,gene_id,annotation,impact,transcript_id,hgvs_c,hgvs_p,clinical_significance,diseases,review_status,rs_id. <example>chromosome,position,variant_id,reference,alternate,gene_name,gene_id,annotation,impact,transcript_id,hgvs_c,hgvs_p,clinical_significance,diseases,review_status,rs_id
X,123456789,VAR123,A,G,GENE1,ENSG00000000001,missense_variant,MODERATE,ENST00000000001,c.123A>G,p.Lys41Arg,Likely_pathogenic,Disease_A; Disease_B; not_provided,reviewed_by_expert_panel,rs0000001</example> Run the analysis inside the Galaxy environment.
